name: Multi-Crop Ewing Grinder
description: The Multi-Crop Ewing Grinder is a milling machine designed for making flour and pastes from grains and nuts

taxonomy.sub_category: Multi-Crop Ewing Grinder Updated on February 24, 2024 · Created on June 24, 2016 Multi-Crop Ewing Grinder The Multi-Crop Ewing Grinder is a milling machine designed for making flour and pastes from grains and nuts Developed By Compatible Technology International Tested By Compatible Technology International Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Bountifield International’s Multi-Crop Ewing Grinder is a hand-operated burr mill capable of making flour from grains and creamy paste from nuts. The mill is portable and equipped with heat-treated burrs that do not require sharpening and can withstand long-term wear. Target SDGs SDG 2: Zero Hunger SDG 1: No Poverty Market Suggested Retail Price $370.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Small and Medium-sized Enterprises Distributors / Implementing Organizations Bountifield International Regions Africa Countries Kenya Manufacturing/Building Method The grain grinder is mass produced in China using materials including welded metal sheets Interview with representative Intellectural Property Type Open-source User Provision Model The Multi-Crop Ewing Grinder can be obtained directly from Bountifield International Distributions to Date Status More than 300 grinders have been distributed since this particular model was introduced in 2011. Feedstock types Nuts and grains Feedstock rate (kg/hr) 6 – 28 Power source Both manual and motorized Energy requirement (W) N/A Portable or stationary Portable Design Specifications The Multi-Crop Ewing Grinder has heat-treated burrs that do not require sharpening and can withstand long-term wear. This reduces the need for replacement of components. The grinder is designed with steel housing and burrs with a diameter of 4.5 inches. Product Schematics Technical Support Upon purchase Bountifield International supplies a grinder manual, grinder training (either in-person or via Skype), and customer support via phone or email Replacement Components The grinder' manual contains a list of possible replacement parts that can be substituted for original parts. Users may contact the Bountifield International office for replacement parts. Lifecycle 5-10 years Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The Multi-Crop Ewing Grinder is designed to be four times more efficient than traditional grinding methods and it is made to be easy to clean Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety There are no known safety hazards linked with the use of this product Complementary Technical Systems The motorized version requires electricity to operate Academic Research and References Calderón, V. R., Duville, K., Lopez, L., Rooney, L., Bermudez, C., Chacon, Y., and Pinilla, E., 2011, Utilization of Compatible Technology International (CTI) Grinders for Sorghum Flour Production in Central America . Duville, K. E., 2012, Sorghum flour production manual for compatible technology international (CTI) burr grinders . Compliance with regulations None Other Information Comments from the Community 6 Comments Noel Wilson says: December 12, 2016 at 5:51 pm Health target is questionable. Sure head loading isn’t wild but ergonomic implications of 20kg sloshing packs arent either. This statement obviously comes from Grief and should say so? Noel Wilson says: December 12, 2016 at 5:52 pm Does it have emergency relief as a target user?
